purpose: Tool-neutral image prompt for the project-level Suming heavy insect soldier multi-state character reference board.

shared_rules.format: single vertical PNG production character reference board, no visible labels or captions inside the image
shared_rules.style: low-magic eastern epic, tactile realistic heavy chitin, old iron, insect-wax, black iron shield, blackstone snowline, restrained cinematic lighting, readable for mobile vertical production reference
shared_rules.locked_badge_rule: Do not redesign existing faction emblems. The locked Suming/Qingming white-wing-over-black-sun emblem may appear only as a tiny copied physical shield扣, rank tag, wax seal, carapace brand, or old iron hardware mark.
must_have: Subject must read as mid-tier heavy insect infantry, not ordinary infantry, not Li Tang, not a heavy carapace general, not a human shield soldier

deep black-green heavy carapace, deep-brown short broad abdomen, outward pelvic carapace, stout hind limbs, heavy clawed feet, thick bone-white mandible guard, bone-white wax joint seal rings, old iron heavy straps, dark-green formation band, black iron gate shield, short heavy spear, gate fork, convoy chain must be visible
four states must preserve one continuous identity: gate shield guard, shield-wall push, heavy convoy escort, snowline gate guard
no readable text, no labels, no UI, no watermark
shared_rules.negative_prompt: human shield soldier, human heavy infantry, knight, samurai, man in insect armor, helmeted human, humanoid warrior, modern riot shield, police shield, heavy carapace general, Li Tang duplicate, slender mantis legs, forearm blade focus, commander rank marks, human face, human hair, human boots, Northern beast, orc, rock monster, redesigned Suming emblem, redesigned Qingming badge, new insect logo, large badge, readable text, labels, captions, Chinese characters, Latin letters, UI, watermark, modern military gear, sci-fi armor, cyberpunk, high magic spell circle, gore, oversaturated game art

input_images.role: locked Suming/Qingming emblem reference; use only as tiny physical shield扣, old iron tag, wax seal, or carapace brand
locked symbol system for small tags, seals, shield hardware, and brands
insect-wax and bone-white seal material reference
blackstone, old iron, frost, and border-wall material reference
ordinary insect infantry contrast; heavy soldier must be wider, heavier, slower, and shield-wall oriented
Li Tang contrast; heavy soldier must not become a fast mantis commander
heavy carapace general contrast; heavy soldier must stay one rank lower and less massive

prompts.image_prompt:
Create one single extra-tall vertical PNG production character reference board for a Suming Heavy Insect Soldier from the series Severed Homeland. Use the project references for low-magic eastern epic style, locked Suming/Qingming institutional materials, deep black-green heavy chitin, old iron, bone-white insect-wax joint rings, black iron gate shield, blackstone, and snowline frost. Do not redesign any badge. The subject is a mid-tier War-Armor Office heavy infantry unit used for gate shielding, shield-wall pressure, heavy convoy escort, granary gates, and border-wall door defense. It must be clearly non-human and non-humanoid, not a human shield soldier, not a knight, not a man in insect armor, not Li Tang, and not a heavy carapace general. Scale reads 2.2 to 2.6 meters in-world, broader than ordinary insect infantry but below heavy carapace generals.

The body must have thick chest and back carapace, deep-brown short broad abdomen plates, outward pelvic carapace, stout hind limbs, heavy clawed feet, slow shield-wall posture, low broad insect head, narrow compound eyes, thick bone-white mandible guard, dark-green neck membrane, and degenerated hard wings compressed into thick layered back armor plates. The lower body is heavier than ordinary infantry but must not become the super-wide siege lower body of the heavy carapace general. Do not use Li Tang's slender mantis legs, long forearm blades, or commander posture.

Show four full-body states of the same heavy insect soldier: 1) gate shield guard, heavy body planted behind a black iron gate shield, short heavy spear tight to shield side, deep black-green heavy carapace, bone-white wax joint rings, old iron heavy straps, dark-green formation band, tiny locked physical tag; 2) shield-wall push, forward pressure stance built to match with two or three soldiers, shield edge, shoulder carapace and clawed feet forming modular wall geometry, movement slow and compressive, not a fast lunge; 3) heavy convoy escort, clawed feet near wheel line, one limb bracing convoy chain, gate fork angled down, heavy body blocking cart side, no human-hand arrest action; 4) snowline gate guard, gate shield and heavy clawed feet planted in blackstone snow, frost on old iron buckles and wax rings, still Suming heavy insect soldier and not Northern beastfolk. Include silent detail panels with no text: low broad head with narrow compound eyes and thick mandible guard; deep black-green chest and back carapace with deep-brown short broad abdomen; outward pelvic carapace, stout hind limbs and heavy clawed feet; bone-white wax joint rings and old iron heavy straps; black iron gate shield, short heavy spear, heavy hook-sickle, gate fork, convoy chain; tiny locked physical shield hardware tag; material swatches for deep black-green heavy carapace, deep-brown abdomen, bone-white guard, bone-white wax, old iron, dark-green formation band, blackstone snow, muted dark-red impact mark. Clean production reference board, no labels, no captions, no typography, no UI, no watermark.
prompts.negative_prompt: human shield soldier, human heavy infantry, knight, samurai, man in insect armor, helmeted human, humanoid warrior, modern riot shield, police shield, heavy carapace general, Li Tang duplicate, slender mantis legs, forearm blade focus, commander rank marks, human face, human hair, human boots, Northern beast, orc, rock monster, redesigned Suming emblem, redesigned Qingming badge, new insect logo, large badge, readable text, labels, captions, Chinese characters, Latin letters, UI, watermark, modern military gear, sci-fi armor, cyberpunk, high magic spell circle, gore, oversaturated game art
